seoTitle: Parwan vs Pascoe Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Parwan and Pascoe Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Parwan vs Pascoe Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Parwan and Pascoe Vale.
heading: Parwan vs Pascoe Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Parwan, Victoria and Pascoe Vale, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Parwan has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Pascoe Vale (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Parwan or Pascoe Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Parwan has a flood risk score of 35/100, while Pascoe Vale scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Parwan scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Pascoe Vale scores 52/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Parwan or Pascoe Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Parwan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
